extractor_judge_boundary.description: An LLM may be used as the claim extractor (prose to structured claim). The verifier's truth label (SUPPORTED | REFUTED | UNVERIFIABLE) must never invoke an LLM. This boundary is the PROVE/ViCrit non-circularity defense: the checker's correctness is grounded in a programmatic oracle over a measured signal, not any model's opinion.

proposition.description: Free-text source claim from the teacher's prose output.

dimension.description: Musical dimension the claim is about.

location.description: Bar-range [bar_start, bar_end] (inclusive) or 'whole_piece'. Beat granularity is not admissible. GATE 1 (v0.2): single-bar localization is INADMISSIBLE on real audio; bar-ranges are admissible only as DEGRADED region-level claims (width >= localization_granularity.min_region_bars), and whole_piece is the only RELIABLE tier. See localization_granularity.

polarity.description: +: signed anomaly in the positive direction. -: signed anomaly in the negative direction. neutral: asserts a virtue or absence-of-problem.

magnitude.description: Optional. When present, tightens the check. When null, falls back to sign+tolerance check.

localization_granularity.description: GATE 1 (#95) outcome: bar-level localization FAILED the ~90% reliability bar on real error-rich audio, so the admissible location granularity is restricted here. The truth label still never invokes an LLM.
localization_granularity.measured_on: 2 real Bach Invention clips (7zVlDxBO5q4, 2cbYFp9kNpg), construction-known corruption sweep {clean, tempo rush 1.3x/1.6x, dropout, noise SNR10}

headline_numbers.note: Even re-transcribing bit-identical audio (clean) loses ~13-20% of resolvable bars -- an AMT-nondeterminism + parangonar match-churn floor BELOW 90% before any corruption. Widening to region-level (W=2..16 bars) raised clean to ~0.86-1.0 over-resolvable but did NOT lift tempo/noise above ~0.6/0.33; out-of-anchor-span bars cap the resolvable pool.

whole_piece.rationale: No bar indexing; uses the full anchor span, always resolvable with >=2 anchors. The robust tier for all active dimensions and the dynamics dispersion / pedaling density / timing CV% checks.

region.rationale: Bar-range claims are admissible only at region width >= min_region_bars, where a fixed per-bar substrate error is a smaller fraction of the region. Still does NOT clear 90% under tempo/noise on these clips; safety comes from abstention (the out-of-anchor-span guard returns UNVERIFIABLE rather than mislocalizing). Low yield, not a reliable headline tier.

single_bar.rationale: Per-bar (width-1) localization error (median 0.4s clean, 3.4s under noise; p90 up to 17s) is too large relative to a single bar to adjudicate a per-bar claim.

localization_granularity.abstention_mechanism: LocationResolver rejects bar locations whose score-time falls outside the matched parangonar anchor span (np.interp would otherwise clamp to the last anchor -> confident, wrong, jittering time). This makes the verifier SAFE-by-abstention on partially-aligned clips.

timing.notes: Tolerance is a percent deviation from established_tempo over the region, NOT absolute onset-ms. This is robust to alignment jitter.

pedaling.notes: Coarse on/off and density only. Half-pedal and flutter pedaling are out of scope. reference is self_density: fraction of bars with at least one pedal event in the same piece.

dynamics.notes: RMS-based loudness proxy. Absolute dB inadmissible (uncontrolled recording gain). Within-region dynamic range only. minimum_events = RMS frames at hop_length=512, SR=16000 (~640ms minimum region).

articulation.rationale: AMT offsets are weaker than onsets (higher quantization error). Gate: offset_accuracy_validation must confirm offset reliability before this dimension is admissible. Region-level only; single-bar articulation claims are too fragile.

phrasing.rationale: Perceptual. The only available proxy is itself a perceptual model output, which reintroduces circularity.

interpretation.rationale: Definitionally subjective. No deterministic physical oracle exists.

timbre.rationale: No physical proxy. Timbre is a multi-dimensional perceptual construct with no single measurable correlate in the available signal chain.

dispatch_order: 2. If dimension.status == 'gated_on_measurement' and gate not validated -> UNVERIFIABLE(gated_dim)
3. If location is not resolvable (no score in catalog / piece not identified / span < alignment_uncertainty / bar score-time outside the matched anchor span) -> UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable)
4. If measurement substrate raised an error -> UNVERIFIABLE(substrate_failure)
5. If region has fewer than dimension.minimum_events -> UNVERIFIABLE(region_too_short)
6. Compute signed deviation d vs reference
8. If d confirms polarity direction beyond tau -> SUPPORTED
verdict_spec.span_vs_uncertainty_failsafe: Verifier must downgrade to UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable) when alignment_uncertainty >= location_span. location_span = bar_end - bar_start + 1 for bar-range; undefined (infinite) for whole_piece.
verdict_spec.note: UNVERIFIABLE claims are never folded into faithfulness or coverage. They are reported as a separate histogram by typed reason code.
